protocols.Paper_title: Clinical-grade Oncolytic Adenovirus Purification using Polysorbate 20 as an Alternative for Cell Lysis
protocols.Evidence: Two detergents were evaluated for cell lysis, Triton X-100 and Polysorbate 20. ... DNA digestion ... Benzonase ... proceeded for 4 hours at 37C

protocols.Paper_title: Clinical-grade Oncolytic Adenovirus Purification using Polysorbate 20 as an Alternative for Cell Lysis
protocols.Evidence: Polysorbate 20 as cell lysis agent compared with Triton X-100; both used as cell lysis detergents in downstream processing
